arts.ttl: VfB Stuttgart exec says Alexander Nübel can definitely be Bayern Munich’s next goalkeeper
arts.sum: VfB Stuttgart CEO Alexander Wehrle thinks Alexander Nübel can step in at Bayern Munich when Manuel Neuer finally decides to step away from the club. Nübel figures to play a key role for VfB Stuttgart in its match this weekend against his parent club and Wehrle is ready to watch the showdown.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich talisman struggling with injury ahead of Champions League showdown against Barcelona
arts.sum: On Wednesday, one of the biggest Champions League matches of the season so far will take place at the Estadi Olimpic. Bayern Munich will make the trip to Catalonia to face high-flying Barcelona, who will be aiming to make it back-to-back victories in the competition. Ahead of the fixture, Barcelona will recover four players: Wojciech […] The post Bayern Munich talisman struggling with injury ahead of Champions League showdown against Barcelona appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala, eyeing FC Barcelona return, to miss Bayern Munich vs. VfB Stuttgart
arts.sum: It was already clear last week that he would miss the game against Stuttgart [@mano_bonke, @kessler_philipp] Bayern Munich is being very careful with Jamal Musiala, who is set to miss this weekend’s clash vs.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Bayern Munich vs. Stuttgart
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Bayern Munich vs. Stuttgart.

arts.ttl: “It feels good”: Thomas Müller says Bayern Munich football is fun again under Vincent Kompany
arts.sum: Müller might not be playing any more this season under Kompany than last under Tuchel, but the veteran’s excitement is palpable. The new coach is bringing some old school intensity back to Bavaria and Müller is here for it.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayer Leverkusen wants to block Bayern Munich move for Florian Wirtz; FC Barcelona dreaming of Manchester City’s Erling Haaland; Leroy Sané might not accept pay cut at Bayern; Arda Guler wants to stay at Real Madrid; and MORE!
arts.sum: It is no secret that Bayern Munich wants Bayer Leverkusen ace Florian Wirtz. According to Sport Bild journalist Christian Falk in his work for CaughtOffside, Bayern Munich star Leroy Sané might be hesitant to take a pay cut — which could make him consider a transfer to a club willing to meet his salary demands:

arts.ttl: Report: How Man Utd can beat Real Madrid to Alphonso Davies transfer
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies would listen to an approach from Manchester United if they are prepared to meet his wage demands, a report has revealed. United offered the young defender a higher salary than Madrid officials were prepared to pay, although that stance came from the fact Yoro was entering the final year of his contract and would have been available on a free transfer in 2025, as is the case with Davies.

arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala and Sacha Boey continue comeback trail
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be without Jamal Musiala against VfB Stuttgart on Saturday, but the young German has continued his rehab to get back on the pitch. After a short session with the ball, the Bayern star does intensive runs.

arts.ttl: Transfer Talk: Man City to battle Bayern Munich for Florian Wirtz's signature
arts.sum: Man City is giving Bayern Munich some competition for the signature of Florian Wirtz. Transfer Talk is with the latest.

arts.ttl: Aleksandar Pavlović still “gets on well” with Leon Goretzka, João Palhinha despite pushing them out of the Bayern Munich starting XI
arts.sum: But this season, with all three competing for playing time in Bayern’s midfield, Pavlović has the favor of new head coach Vincent Kompany and is leaving the competition in the dust, gathering nearly 4 times the amount of minutes Goretzka and Palhinha have assembled together. In the 2023/24, Bayern Munich ’s Leon Goretzka fought back from a poor start to regain a starting role for the vast majority of the season, João Palhinha was one of Fulham FC ’s most important players while Aleksandar Pavlović enjoyed an impressive debut campaign that nonetheless saw him relegated to what was mostly a supporting role.
